mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_organization WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND del_flag = '0' ORDER BY code
SELECT * FROM sys_organization WHERE del_flag = '0' ORDER BY code
SELECT * FROM sys_organization WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND parent_id = '-1' AND del_flag = '0'

SELECT a.id, a.name, a.parent_id, a.code, a.company_id, a.level, a.leader, a.phone, a.address, a.org_id, a.sort, a.status, a.remark, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time FROM sys_organization a WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.del_flag = '0'

SELECT id, name FROM sys_organization WHERE del_flag = '0' AND id IN
#{id}
SELECT DISTINCT b.id, b.name, '-1' AS parent_id FROM pr_data_grant a INNER JOIN sys_organization b ON a.org_id = b.id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND b.del_flag = '0' AND b.level = '2'
SELECT id, name, '-1' AS parent_id FROM sys_organization WHERE level = #{level} AND del_flag = '0'

SELECT * FROM sys_organization WHERE id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT b.parent_id FROM pr_data_grant a INNER JOIN sys_organization b ON a.org_id = b.id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND b.del_flag = '0' ) AND level = '1' AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_organization (id, name, company_id, parent_id, code, level, leader, phone, address, remark, create_by, create_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{companyId}, #{parentId}, #{code}, #{level}, #{leader}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_organization SET name = #{name}, leader = #{leader}, phone = #{phone}, address = #{address}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM pr_data_grant WHERE org_id = #{id} AND company_id = #{companyId}
